zotero.abstractNote: We present GAN-Avatar, a novel approach for creating a personalized, controllable, and high-fidelity 3D human head avatar from a monocular video. Our method leverages a pre-trained 3D-aware generative model to learn a personalized avatar that can be animated with novel expressions. To achieve this, we propose a novel optimization strategy that adapts the generative model to the specific identity of the subject in the video. We introduce a latent space optimization that allows for precise control over facial expressions while maintaining the identity and appearance of the subject. Our method produces high-quality, temporally consistent results and outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual quality and controllability.
